categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_APP
categories.precondition: Device is on home screen or another app; target app may not be on home screen
abstract_steps: Scroll alphabetically to locate the target app
Advance through any first-run onboarding screens by tapping the primary forward control
failure_modes: Confusing onboarding with empty state and giving up early
Pressing system Back on an onboarding screen and exiting the app
Tapping the wrong adjacent icon in the drawer
verification_checklist: Main content list/dashboard of the app is visible
Onboarding text is no longer displayed

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Target entity (record/item) exists in a list within the app
abstract_steps: Scroll to locate the named entity
Read the requested field(s) including units
failure_modes: Reading from a summary row when full precision/units only appear in detail view
Confusing similarly named entities
Stopping at a tab that does not contain the requested metric
verification_checklist: Entity name on detail screen matches the requested one
Reported value(s) include correct units
If comparison, both items were checked before answering

categories.name: COMPARE_ENTRIES
categories.precondition: Two named entities exist in the list
abstract_steps: Open first entity, record metric, navigate back
Answer with the chosen entity and/or numeric result
failure_modes: Forgetting to convert units when mixed (e.g., feet vs miles)
Reading wrong metric label
Picking the wrong direction (greater vs lesser)
verification_checklist: Both metrics use the same unit
Answer matches the requested polarity (longer/higher/shorter)

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Editable entity exists and is reachable from a list
abstract_steps: Tap target text field; existing text is typically auto-selected, so typing overwrites it
failure_modes: Tapping save before all required fields are set
Editing wrong field due to mislocation
Failing to dismiss the keyboard, causing Save to be off-screen
verification_checklist: Detail header reflects new values after saving
List row shows updated values when navigating back

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
failure_modes: Dismissing the confirmation dialog by tapping outside
Deleting the wrong entity due to duplicate names
verification_checklist: List no longer contains the deleted entity
No error toast appeared

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
abstract_steps: Open overflow menu in app top bar
Navigate to the relevant settings subpage
Toggle switches or select desired option in dialog
failure_modes: Toggling a similarly named option
Not realizing some toggles are already in the desired state
Leaving extra toggles enabled when instruction implies exclusivity
verification_checklist: Each requested toggle is in the correct state
Any radio choice displays the desired value in its summary row

categories.name: SELECT_FORMAT_OR_OPTION
categories.precondition: An action triggers a chooser/radio dialog
abstract_steps: Select the required radio in the dialog
failure_modes: Tapping Cancel after selecting
Assuming a default selection without verifying
verification_checklist: After confirm, the corresponding settings row or subsequent action reflects the chosen option

categories.name: START_OR_RESUME_RECORDING
categories.precondition: On list or detail of an existing record
abstract_steps: For new: tap the primary record floating action button
For resume: open detail -> contextual menu -> Resume
failure_modes: Trying to resume from list directly without opening detail
Starting a new recording when resume was requested
verification_checklist: Active recording screen with stop control is visible
Live timer is incrementing

categories.name: ADD_SUB_ITEM_DURING_PARENT_ACTIVITY
categories.precondition: Parent activity (e.g., recording) is currently active
abstract_steps: Open the add sub-item control in the active activity UI
Fill required fields or accept defaults
failure_modes: Attempting to add the sub-item while parent is not active
Cancelling instead of confirming
verification_checklist: Returned to parent activity screen
Sub-item appears in associated list if available

categories.name: EXPORT_OR_SHARE
categories.precondition: Entity detail screen with share action
abstract_steps: If a format chooser appears, select the requested format and confirm
Pick the target app in the system share sheet
failure_modes: No external handler installed leading to 'no apps' message; this may still satisfy in-app completion
Choosing a different format than requested
verification_checklist: System share sheet displayed correct file/format, or chosen target completed import

categories.name: IMPORT_VIA_SHARE_BACK
categories.precondition: Entity can be shared as a file and the same app accepts imports
abstract_steps: Choose the same app as the share target
Wait for import completion dialog and read its status (count, errors)
failure_modes: Closing dialog before reading values
Selecting a different target app
verification_checklist: Completion dialog shown
Error/success counts captured

categories.name: SEARCH_WITHIN_LIST
categories.precondition: List screen exposes a search affordance
failure_modes: Empty results misinterpreted as failure when list itself is empty
Typing in wrong field
verification_checklist: Search query echoed in field
Result list reflects query

categories.name: SWITCH_VIEW_TAB
abstract_steps: Tap target tab in the top tab bar
failure_modes: Selecting an adjacent tab
Mistaking bottom toolbar icons for tabs
verification_checklist: Selected tab is highlighted
Content matches expected axis/metric
